items: Welcome by the School Board President

Oral Communication - If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on: (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3rKbPfVCTpOsK5ILqjnU2u-h-NuNx-vUq4OZxYNVR8lc4aQ/viewform?usp=sf_link) prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Discussion on the Safe Reopening of RCSD School Campuses this Fall of 2020-21
Approval of Updated RCTA Contract Language and RCTA/RCSD Tentative Agreements

llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes to agenda announced. Item 6 (Changes to the Agenda) was called and no changes were reported.

items.intro_words: Okay, so it's six o' Clock. Are we ready to get started?
Can we have a roll call, please? Trustee McBride.
So welcome, everybody. Thank you for joining us for our June 3rd special board meeting.
I would like to forego the Pledge of Allegiance and join me in a moment of silence
We are Moving on to 3.1 changes to the agenda. Does anybody have any changes?
We are Moving on to 3.1 changes to the agenda. Does anybody have any changes?
I'm just checking. We do have one item for oral communication.
So item 6.1. If she's not here, then we can go ahead and move on to item 6.1.
So item 6.1. If she's not here, then we can go ahead and move on to item 6.1.
So we'll move on if there are no other comments or questions. Okay. No consent items.
That brings us to the end of our agenda. So do we have a motion to adjourn?
